short_summary: The FCC confirms that AI voice cloning counts as artificial or prerecorded voice because it artificially simulates a human voice.
notes: Strongest authority source for artificial/simulated voice relation.

authority_reason: Official FCC notice preceding the 2024 ruling
short_summary: The notice asks how AI technologies that simulate a human voice fit within artificial or prerecorded voice rules.
notes: Useful chronology before the final ruling.

short_summary: The FCC asks whether artificial or prerecorded voice can be defined to exclude positive accessibility uses of AI voice technologies.
notes: Important because artificial voice is not only suspicious or deceptive.

source_name: Development and Mechanical Characterization of Artificial Skin for Surgical Suture Training
authority_reason: Peer-reviewed biomedical article with PubMed/PMC record
short_summary: The abstract describes realistic artificial skin models that replicate viscoelastic and tensile properties of human skin for training.
notes: Adds hard medical support beyond university news.

short_summary: NIH describes realistic 3D human skin models and artificial skin used to study eczema and drug response.
notes: Strong .gov support for artificial skin as model not fake.

source_name: Engineered Skin Tissue Equivalents for Product Evaluation and Therapeutic Applications
short_summary: The review discusses artificial and reconstructed skin models as substitutes or equivalents used in research and therapeutic applications.
notes: Good for artificial as model/equivalent basin.

short_summary: The study uses artificially simulated microgravity to study cardiovascular changes in humans.
notes: Useful non-voice evidence that artificially simulated names controlled modeling rather than fake.

short_summary: Artificially simulated defects are used in vocal tract models to establish speech simulation for treatment planning.
notes: Good technical bridge between artificial model and simulation.

short_summary: Artificial life is defined as computer simulation of life used to study living systems and adaptive behavior.
notes: Strong exit marker from object/material toward life process.

source_name: Defining Designing and Distinguishing Artificial Companions
short_summary: The review defines artificial companions through adaptivity and engagement aimed at emotional bonds and long-term human-machine relationships.
notes: Strong authority for companion as Chart 5 exit marker.

source_name: Artificial Intelligence: Foundations of Computational Agents
short_summary: The textbook separates real/fake from natural/artificial and argues artificial intelligence can be real intelligence created artificially.
notes: Still best conceptual support for non-collapse into fake.
